data.name: Home_AnonymousHeading
data.value: Bank guarantee work starts from queues, not framework details.

data.name: Home_AnonymousSummary
data.value: Sign in to see the real operating picture: approvals waiting for you, requests still in flight, dispatch handoffs, and guarantees nearing expiry.

data.name: Home_DashboardSummary
data.value: The home page now surfaces live queues, ownership, handoffs, and guarantee exposure instead of technical framework metadata.

data.name: Home_DashboardAttentionSummary
data.value: {0} approvals are waiting, {1} open requests are still owned by you, and {2} guarantees are nearing expiry.

data.name: Home_PendingApprovalsSummary
data.value: Only requests currently actionable by your assigned role or active delegation appear here.

data.name: Home_MyRequestsSummary
data.value: These requests still belong to you and are not finished yet.

data.name: Home_ExpiringSummary
data.value: Active guarantees due within the next 30 days.

data.name: Home_RecentIntakeSummary
data.value: The most recent document captures entering BG, with their intake scenario and provenance.

data.name: Home_HandoffSummary
data.value: Cross-role queues that can slow the end-to-end flow if they start to accumulate.

data.name: Home_EmptyApprovals
data.value: No approval items are waiting for you right now.

data.name: Home_EmptyRequests
data.value: You do not own any open requests right now.

data.name: Home_EmptyExpiring
data.value: No active guarantees are nearing expiry in the next 30 days.

data.name: Home_EmptyIntake
data.value: No intake activity has been recorded yet.

data.name: Home_NoOperationalAccessTitle
data.value: No operational areas are assigned to this account

data.name: Home_NoOperationalAccessBody
data.value: This account is authenticated successfully, but it does not currently carry any workload permissions.

data.name: FooterStack
data.value: ASP.NET Core 8 + Razor Pages + API + PostgreSQL + IIS

data.name: HeroTitle
data.value: Clean baseline for the bank guarantees application

data.name: HeroSummaryPrefix
data.value: This baseline confirms the agreed technical choices: operational UI with

data.name: NextStepBody
data.value: After this baseline we will start designing the system modules themselves: bank guarantees, batches, permissions, workflow, and bilingual operational screens.

data.name: UsersPageSummary
data.value: BG currently manages users locally while keeping the model ready for future hospital identity integration.

data.name: EmptyUsers
data.value: No users have been created yet.

data.name: NoRolesAvailable
data.value: Create roles first before assigning them to users.

data.name: RolesPageSummary
data.value: Roles group permissions now so the rest of the modules can build on a stable authorization baseline.

data.name: EmptyRoles
data.value: No roles have been created yet.

data.name: identity.role_not_found
data.value: One or more selected roles were not found.

data.name: identity.permission_not_found
data.value: One or more selected permissions were not found.

data.name: identity.password_too_short
data.value: Password must be at least 12 characters.

data.name: identity.user_not_found
data.value: The selected user was not found.

data.name: Permission_intake.finalize
data.value: Finalize intake in one save operation

data.name: Permission_approvals.sign
data.value: Approve, return, or reject requests at the current stage

data.name: Permission_dispatch.email
data.value: Send letters to bank official email

data.name: IntakeWorkspace_Summary
data.value: This workspace is dedicated to the specialist who scans paper documents, verifies the extracted data, and saves the document and its data in one controlled handoff.

data.name: IntakeWorkspace_ReviewCardBody
data.value: The operator sees extracted values, checks them against the paper document, then completes the intake in a single save operation.

data.name: IntakeWorkspace_RequiredFieldsTitle
data.value: Fields that must be checked explicitly

data.name: IntakeWorkspace_SaveMode
data.value: One save for document and verified data

data.name: IntakeWorkspace_NoEligibleActorBody
data.value: Create at least one active user with intake permissions before scanning or saving intake packages.

data.name: IntakeWorkspace_ActorScopedNotice
data.value: The intake workspace is loaded under the selected intake actor. Document capture, verification, and save actions will be attributed to that person.

data.name: IntakeWorkspace_ActorContextSummary
data.value: Until authentication is connected, choose the acting intake specialist explicitly so the ledger records who captured and verified the document.

data.name: IntakeWorkspace_CaptureProvenanceSummary
data.value: Record how the document entered BG, which workstation or source produced it, and what external reference can prove that origin later.

data.name: IntakeWorkspace_ProvenanceHint_ManualUpload
data.value: Use manual upload when the operator picked the file directly from a workstation.

data.name: IntakeWorkspace_ProvenanceHint_ScanStation
data.value: Use scan station when the paper was captured from a dedicated scanner or MFP device. Record the device or station name.

data.name: IntakeWorkspace_ProvenanceHint_OracleImport
data.value: Use Oracle import when the document arrived from Oracle or another upstream repository. Record both source system and external document reference.

data.name: IntakeAction_Scan
data.value: Scan or upload the paper document

data.name: IntakeAction_Classify
data.value: Confirm the document type and intake scenario

data.name: IntakeAction_Verify
data.value: Review extracted fields against the printed source

data.name: IntakeAction_Save
data.value: Save the document and verified data together

data.name: IntakeExcluded_RequestActions
data.value: No request creation or operational actions

data.name: IntakeExcluded_Dispatch
data.value: No bank delivery or email dispatch

data.name: IntakePipeline_ClassifyPage
data.value: Classify each page as text-native, mixed, or image-only before extraction.

data.name: IntakePipeline_DirectPdfText
data.value: Use direct PDF text extraction first whenever a text layer is present.

data.name: IntakePipeline_ImagePreprocessing
data.value: Apply image preprocessing only to mixed or scanned pages that need OCR help.

data.name: IntakePipeline_OcrAndLayout
data.value: Run OCR and layout parsing for scanned content using the approved local pipeline.

data.name: IntakePipeline_PostProcessing
data.value: Normalize values such as bank names, dates, amounts, and document types.

data.name: IntakePipeline_HumanReview
data.value: Show confidence scores and require explicit review for critical fields.

data.name: IntakePipeline_SaveAndHandoff
data.value: Save once, then hand the record off to the next operational queue.

data.name: IntakeQuality_TextFirst
data.value: Text-first extraction remains mandatory for native PDF pages.

data.name: IntakeQuality_Confidence
data.value: Every extracted field must carry a confidence score.

data.name: IntakeQuality_SingleSave
data.value: The operator finishes the task through one final save action.

data.name: IntakeQuality_SourceDocument
data.value: No verified intake record exists without the scanned source document.

data.name: IntakeQuality_BankSpecificRules
data.value: Bank-specific extraction rules are allowed when one template is not enough.

data.name: IntakeFuture_ScanStation
data.value: Keep a dedicated intake workstation for manual scanning in the initial rollout.

data.name: IntakeFuture_ScanToFolder
data.value: Support scan-to-folder as a simple internal integration path.

data.name: IntakeFuture_DeviceApi
data.value: Allow future scanner-device API integration without changing the review workflow.

data.name: IntakeScenario_NewGuarantee_Summary
data.value: Register a newly received guarantee instrument from the scanned paper document.

data.name: IntakeScenario_NewGuarantee_SaveOutcome
data.value: The guarantee, its scanned document, and the verified core data are stored together.

data.name: IntakeScenario_NewGuarantee_Handoff
data.value: The saved record moves to the operational team for any later action or workflow.

data.name: IntakeScenario_Extension_Summary
data.value: Capture an incoming bank letter confirming that the guarantee expiry date was extended.

data.name: IntakeScenario_Extension_SaveOutcome
data.value: The bank response document and its verified extracted data are stored for later operational confirmation handling.

data.name: IntakeScenario_Extension_Handoff
data.value: The operational team reviews the saved confirmation and completes the extension process.

data.name: IntakeScenario_Reduction_Summary
data.value: Capture an incoming bank letter confirming that the guarantee amount was reduced.

data.name: IntakeScenario_Reduction_SaveOutcome
data.value: The bank response document and the confirmed reduced amount are stored for operational application.

data.name: IntakeScenario_Reduction_Handoff
data.value: The operational team reviews the saved confirmation and applies the real reduced amount to the guarantee.

data.name: IntakeScenario_Release_Summary
data.value: Capture an incoming bank letter confirming that the guarantee was released.

data.name: IntakeScenario_Release_SaveOutcome
data.value: The scanned release confirmation and its verified data are saved as one intake package.

data.name: IntakeScenario_Release_Handoff
data.value: The next role decides and confirms the release outcome in operations.

data.name: IntakeScenario_Status_Summary
data.value: Capture a bank reply that confirms the current status of an existing guarantee.

data.name: IntakeScenario_Status_SaveOutcome
data.value: The status reply is saved without giving the intake user any operational authority.

data.name: IntakeScenario_Status_Handoff
data.value: The operations team reviews the reply and decides whether any business action is needed.

data.name: IntakeScenario_Attachment_Summary
data.value: Attach an additional scanned document related to an existing guarantee.

data.name: IntakeScenario_Attachment_SaveOutcome
data.value: The attachment is stored with metadata and linked to the guarantee in one save.

data.name: IntakeScenario_Attachment_Handoff
data.value: The attachment becomes available to later operational, approval, or dispatch stages.

data.name: OperationsQueue_Summary
data.value: This queue receives every saved intake package and hands it over to the next operational layer without mixing it with request creation or approvals.

data.name: OperationsQueue_QueueTitle
data.value: Saved intake packages waiting for operational handling

data.name: OperationsQueue_QueueSummary
data.value: Each item represents a scanned guarantee or bank reply that was verified by intake and now waits for the correct operational team.

data.name: OperationsQueue_OpenItemsSummary
data.value: These items came from intake and are now visible to the next operational layer only.

data.name: OperationsQueue_Empty
data.value: No operational review items are waiting in the queue.

data.name: OperationsQueue_NoMatchSuggestions
data.value: The system could not find a confident request match yet.

data.name: OperationsQueue_ApplySuccess
data.value: Bank response was applied successfully for guarantee {0}.

data.name: OperationsQueue_WorkflowTemplatesSummary
data.value: Approval paths differ by request type, so each request starts from a dedicated template instead of a single fixed approval chain.

data.name: OperationsQueue_NoEligibleActorBody
data.value: Create at least one active user with operations queue permissions before applying bank responses.

data.name: OperationsQueue_ActorScopedNotice
data.value: The operations queue is loaded under the selected operations actor. Applying bank confirmations will be attributed to that person.

data.name: OperationsQueue_ActorContextSummary
data.value: Select the acting operations reviewer explicitly so the ledger records who linked and applied the incoming bank response.

data.name: OperationsMatchReason_RequestTypeAligned
data.value: Request type matches the incoming bank response scenario.

data.name: OperationsMatchReason_WaitingForBankResponse
data.value: The request is already waiting for a bank response.

data.name: OperationsMatchReason_ApprovedForDispatch
data.value: The request is at least approved for dispatch.

data.name: OperationsMatchReason_OnlyOpenCandidate
data.value: This is the only open request on the same guarantee that fits this response type.

data.name: OperationsMatchReason_ResponseAfterDispatch
data.value: The bank letter date is after the outgoing dispatch date.

data.name: OperationsMatchReason_ResponseDateNearDispatch
data.value: The response date is close to the dispatch date.

data.name: OperationsMatchReason_ExpiryDateMatches
data.value: The proposed expiry date in the response matches the request.

data.name: OperationsMatchReason_AmountMatches
data.value: The confirmed amount in the response matches the request.

data.name: WorkflowTemplate_Extend_Summary
data.value: Extension requests follow the common four-signature path and stop at the Deputy Director of Financial Affairs.

data.name: WorkflowTemplate_Reduce_Summary
data.value: Reduction requests follow the common four-signature path and stop at the Deputy Director of Financial Affairs.

data.name: WorkflowTemplate_Replacement_Title
data.value: Replacement with reduced guarantee signature path

data.name: WorkflowTemplate_Replacement_Summary
data.value: Replacement-with-reduction requests follow the common four-signature path and stop at the Deputy Director of Financial Affairs.

data.name: WorkflowTemplate_VerifyStatus_Summary
data.value: Status verification letters follow the common four-signature path and stop at the Deputy Director of Financial Affairs.

data.name: WorkflowTemplate_ReleaseContract_Title
data.value: Release request path for contract guarantees

data.name: WorkflowTemplate_ReleaseContract_Summary
data.value: Contract-guarantee releases follow the common four signatures, then three contract-management approvals, then the Executive Vice President.

data.name: WorkflowTemplate_ReleasePurchaseOrder_Title
data.value: Release request path for purchase-order guarantees

data.name: WorkflowTemplate_ReleasePurchaseOrder_Summary
data.value: Purchase-order releases follow the common four signatures, then three procurement approvals, then the Executive Vice President.

data.name: WorkflowStage_GuaranteesSupervisor_Summary
data.value: Every outgoing bank letter starts with the supervisor of the bank guarantees section.

data.name: WorkflowStage_DepartmentManager_Summary
data.value: The next signature is always the department or administration manager.

data.name: WorkflowStage_ProgramDirector_Summary
data.value: The third common signature is the program director.

data.name: WorkflowStage_DeputyFinancialAffairsDirector_Summary
data.value: This is the fourth and final common signature for all requests, and the final one for extension, reduction, replacement, and status verification letters.

data.name: WorkflowStage_ContractsSigner1_Summary
data.value: Contract-guarantee releases then move to the first contract-management approver.

data.name: WorkflowStage_ContractsSigner2_Summary
data.value: The second contracts-management approver signs after the first contract approver.

data.name: WorkflowStage_ContractsSigner3_Summary
data.value: The third contracts-management approver completes the contract-side release approvals.

data.name: WorkflowStage_ProcurementSigner1_Summary
data.value: Purchase-order releases then move to the first procurement approver.

data.name: WorkflowStage_ProcurementSigner2_Summary
data.value: The second procurement approver signs after the first procurement approver.

data.name: WorkflowStage_ProcurementSigner3_Summary
data.value: The third procurement approver completes the procurement-side release approvals.

data.name: WorkflowStage_ExecutiveVicePresident_Summary
data.value: Every release letter ends with the Executive Vice President signature.

data.name: WorkflowSignatureMode_ButtonStampedPdf
data.value: Current mode: button-applied signature on the letter PDF

data.name: WorkflowSignatureEffect_FinalLetterPdf
data.value: Effect: this signature is rendered on the final outgoing letter PDF

data.name: WorkflowAdmin_Summary
data.value: System administration can increase, decrease, reorder, and assign approval stages per request path without changing code.

data.name: WorkflowAdmin_NoDefinitionsBody
data.value: Run the application initialization once so the default request paths can be seeded.

data.name: WorkflowAdmin_NoStages
data.value: No stages are configured for this workflow yet.

data.name: WorkflowAdmin_GovernanceSummary
data.value: Configure cross-stage approval controls for this request path, including final-signature delegation and financial thresholds.

data.name: WorkflowAdmin_AddStageSummary
data.value: Add a new approval/signature step to the selected request path.

data.name: WorkflowAdmin_NoStageSummary
data.value: No custom summary is configured for this stage.

data.name: WorkflowAdmin_UpdateGovernanceSuccess
data.value: The workflow governance settings were updated.

data.name: workflow.definition_not_found
data.value: The selected workflow definition was not found.

data.name: workflow.stage_not_found
data.value: The selected workflow stage was not found.

data.name: workflow.role_required
data.value: Every workflow stage must have an assigned role.

data.name: workflow.role_not_found
data.value: The selected role was not found.

data.name: workflow.stage_already_first
data.value: This stage is already the first stage in the workflow.

data.name: workflow.stage_already_last
data.value: This stage is already the last stage in the workflow.

data.name: workflow.delegation_amount_threshold_invalid
data.value: The workflow amount threshold must be a number greater than zero.

data.name: workflow.definition_requires_stage
data.value: A workflow definition must keep at least one stage.

data.name: IntakeWorkspace_ReviewCardPendingBody
data.value: Run extraction first to replace the sample values with the staged document output for review.

data.name: IntakeWorkspace_SubmissionSummary
data.value: Upload the scanned document, review the extracted values, and save the document with the verified data in one controlled handoff.

data.name: IntakeWorkspace_FileHint
data.value: Accepted formats: PDF, JPG, PNG, and TIFF. A new extract can replace the current draft before final save.

data.name: IntakeWorkspace_NoDraftBody
data.value: No staged draft exists yet. Upload the paper document scan, then run extraction to populate the verification fields.

data.name: IntakeExtractionRoute_PdfTextFirst
data.value: Direct PDF text first, then OCR fallback if needed

data.name: IntakeExtractionRoute_OcrFallback
data.value: Scanned image route with OCR and layout extraction

data.name: IntakeFieldProvenance_DirectPdfText
data.value: Derived from direct PDF text extraction

data.name: intake.unsupported_scenario
data.value: The selected intake scenario is not supported.

data.name: intake.file_required
data.value: Upload a scanned file before extracting.

data.name: intake.staged_document_not_found
data.value: The staged document draft was not found. Extract the file again before saving.

data.name: intake.guarantee_not_found
data.value: The guarantee could not be found for this intake record.

data.name: intake.bank_name_required
data.value: Bank name is required for a new guarantee.

data.name: intake.beneficiary_required
data.value: Beneficiary is required for a new guarantee.

data.name: intake.principal_required
data.value: Principal / contractor is required for a new guarantee.

data.name: intake.guarantee_category_required
data.value: Select the guarantee category for the new guarantee.

data.name: intake.new_expiry_date_required
data.value: New expiry date is required for extension confirmations.

data.name: intake.status_statement_required
data.value: Status statement is required for status verification.

data.name: intake.attachment_note_required
data.value: Attachment note is required for supporting attachments.

data.name: intake.actor_required
data.value: Select the acting intake specialist first.

data.name: intake.actor_invalid
data.value: The selected intake actor is not valid for this workspace.

data.name: intake.source_system_name_required
data.value: Enter the source system or device name for scan-station and imported documents.

data.name: intake.source_reference_required
data.value: Enter the external source reference for imported documents.

data.name: RequestsWorkspace_Summary
data.value: This workspace belongs to the request-preparation role only. It creates request records and shows only the active user's own requests and their progress.

data.name: RequestsWorkspace_ActorContextSummary
data.value: Until authentication is connected, load the workspace through an explicit request-user context. The workspace still isolates the list to the selected owner only.

data.name: RequestsWorkspace_NoEligibleActor
data.value: No eligible request actor is available.

data.name: RequestsWorkspace_NoEligibleActorBody
data.value: Create at least one active user with request permissions before using this workspace.

data.name: RequestsWorkspace_ActorIsolatedNotice
data.value: This workspace is isolated to the selected request actor. Only their own requests and what happens on them are visible here.

data.name: RequestsWorkspace_IsolationSummary
data.value: The request layer sees only the current actor's requests, statuses, and linked correspondence counts. It does not expose other users' work.

data.name: RequestsWorkspace_CreateSummary
data.value: Prepare the business request here. Approval routing and dispatch remain in later roles.

data.name: RequestsWorkspace_CurrentWorkflowSummary
data.value: Approval levels differ by request type, and every approval stage is treated as a signature stage whose mark appears on the final letter PDF.

data.name: RequestsWorkspace_NoWorkflowTemplate
data.value: No workflow template is available for the selected request type.

data.name: RequestsWorkspace_MyRequestsSummary
data.value: The list below shows only the active actor's requests and their current progress.

data.name: RequestsWorkspace_Empty
data.value: No requests have been created for this actor yet.

data.name: RequestsWorkspace_LedgerEmpty
data.value: No ledger entries were recorded for this request yet.

data.name: RequestsWorkspace_SubmitSuccess
data.value: The request was sent for approval. Current stage: {0} ({1}).

data.name: requests.user_context_invalid
data.value: The selected request actor is not valid for this workspace.

data.name: requests.guarantee_not_found
data.value: The guarantee number could not be found.

data.name: requests.duplicate_open_request
data.value: An open request of the same type already exists for this user and guarantee.

data.name: requests.requested_amount_required
data.value: Enter the requested amount for reduction-based requests.

data.name: requests.requested_expiry_date_required
data.value: Enter the requested expiry date for extension requests.

data.name: requests.request_validation_failed
data.value: The request could not be created because the proposed data failed domain validation.

data.name: ApprovalQueue_Summary
data.value: Each approver sees only the requests that reached the current stage assigned to one of their roles.

data.name: ApprovalQueue_NoEligibleActorBody
data.value: Create approver users and assign them roles that both appear in workflow stages and carry approval permissions.

data.name: ApprovalQueue_ActorScopedNotice
data.value: The approval queue is scoped to the selected approver only.

data.name: ApprovalQueue_ActorContextSummary
data.value: Switch the acting approver to inspect only the requests that reached their current stage.

data.name: ApprovalQueue_ItemsSummary
data.value: Approve, return, or reject only the requests that are currently assigned to the selected approver's role.

data.name: ApprovalQueue_Empty
data.value: No requests are waiting for this approver right now.

data.name: ApprovalQueue_AttachmentsEmpty
data.value: No documents were attached to this request.

data.name: ApprovalQueue_TimelineEmpty
data.value: No timeline entries are recorded for this request yet.

data.name: ApprovalQueue_GovernanceBlockedActionHint
data.value: An eligible direct role owner or another compliant approver must complete this stage.

data.name: ApprovalQueue_GovernanceConflictSameActor
data.value: The selected approver already signed an earlier stage in this request.

data.name: ApprovalQueue_GovernanceConflictSameResponsibleSigner
data.value: The responsible signer for this action already appears in an earlier stage of the same request.

data.name: ApprovalQueue_GovernanceConflictStageDirectSignerOnly
data.value: This workflow stage is configured to require the direct assigned signer and does not allow delegation.

data.name: ApprovalQueue_GovernanceConflictFinalSignatureDirectOnly
data.value: The final signature stage must be completed directly by the assigned role owner and cannot use delegation.

data.name: ApprovalQueue_GovernanceConflictAmountThresholdDirectOnly
data.value: This request exceeds the direct-signer amount threshold configured for this workflow and cannot be approved through delegation.

data.name: ApprovalQueue_GovernanceConflictRequestTypeDirectOnly
data.value: This request type requires a direct signer on this signature stage and does not allow delegation.

data.name: ApprovalQueue_PriorSignaturesEmpty
data.value: No earlier signatures were recorded for this request yet.

data.name: ApprovalDossier_Summary
data.value: Review the full request file, its attachments, prior signatures, and structured ledger before making a decision.

data.name: ApprovalDossier_RequestNotAvailable
data.value: This request is no longer available in the active approver context. It may have moved to another stage or no longer belong to this approver.

data.name: ApprovalDossier_RequestSummary
data.value: This view consolidates the request facts, supporting documents, prior signatures, and the full ledger trail.

data.name: ApprovalDossier_GovernanceClear
data.value: No governance policy is currently blocking this decision for the selected approver.

data.name: ApprovalGovernancePolicy_RequestTypeDirectOnly
data.value: Direct signer required for this request type

data.name: approvals.approver_context_invalid
data.value: The selected approver is not valid for the approval queue.

data.name: approvals.request_not_found
data.value: The selected request was not found.

data.name: approvals.request_not_actionable
data.value: This request is not currently assigned to the selected approver.

data.name: approvals.governance_policy_blocked
data.value: This approval action is blocked by approval governance policy on this request.

data.name: approvals.governance_signer_reuse_blocked
data.value: This approval action is blocked by signer-separation governance on this request.

data.name: DispatchWorkspace_Summary
data.value: Record the outgoing request letter only after approvals finish and the request becomes ready for bank delivery or email dispatch.

data.name: DispatchWorkspace_NoEligibleActorBody
data.value: Create dispatch users and assign dispatch permissions before recording outgoing bank letters.

data.name: DispatchWorkspace_ActorScopedNotice
data.value: The dispatch workspace is loaded under the selected dispatch actor.

data.name: DispatchWorkspace_ActorContextSummary
data.value: Until authentication is connected, load the workspace through an explicit dispatch-user context.

data.name: DispatchWorkspace_ItemsSummary
data.value: Only requests approved for dispatch appear here. Recording the outgoing reference moves the request into awaiting bank response.

data.name: DispatchWorkspace_Empty
data.value: No approved requests are waiting for dispatch right now.

data.name: DispatchWorkspace_PrintSuccess
data.value: Outgoing letter {0} was printed for guarantee {1} (copy {2}).

data.name: DispatchWorkspace_DispatchSuccess
data.value: Outgoing reference {0} was dispatched for guarantee {1}.

data.name: DispatchWorkspace_PendingDeliverySummary
data.value: These letters already left BG and now need an explicit delivery confirmation to complete the external handoff trace.

data.name: DispatchWorkspace_PendingDeliveryEmpty
data.value: No outgoing letters are waiting for delivery confirmation.

data.name: DispatchWorkspace_DeliverySuccess
data.value: Delivery confirmation for outgoing reference {0} was recorded on guarantee {1}.

data.name: DispatchLedgerPolicy_PrintRecordedBeforeExternalDispatch
data.value: Print must be recorded before external dispatch

data.name: dispatch.dispatcher_context_invalid
data.value: The selected dispatcher is not valid for the dispatch workspace.

data.name: dispatch.print_permission_required
data.value: The selected dispatch actor cannot record printing.

data.name: dispatch.record_permission_required
data.value: The selected dispatch actor cannot record external sending or delivery.

data.name: dispatch.email_permission_required
data.value: The selected dispatch actor cannot use official email dispatch.

data.name: dispatch.request_not_found
data.value: The selected request was not found.

data.name: dispatch.request_not_ready
data.value: Only approved requests can be recorded in dispatch.

data.name: dispatch.print_mode_required
data.value: Select how the outgoing letter was printed.

data.name: dispatch.dispatch_channel_required
data.value: Select how the outgoing letter left BG.

data.name: dispatch.outgoing_letter_not_found
data.value: The outgoing letter record was not found for this request.

data.name: dispatch.delivery_not_pending
data.value: This outgoing letter is not waiting for delivery confirmation.

data.name: dispatch.outgoing_letter_reference_mismatch
data.value: The existing outgoing letter uses a different reference or letter date.

data.name: operations.review_item_not_found
data.value: The selected review item was not found.

data.name: operations.review_item_not_actionable
data.value: This review item cannot be applied as a bank response.

data.name: operations.request_required
data.value: Select the request that matches this bank response.

data.name: operations.request_not_found
data.value: The selected request was not found on this guarantee.

data.name: operations.request_not_compatible
data.value: The selected request is not compatible with this bank response.

data.name: operations.confirmed_expiry_date_required
data.value: Enter or confirm the new expiry date before applying the extension response.

data.name: operations.confirmed_amount_required
data.value: Enter or confirm the reduced amount before applying the response.

data.name: operations.replacement_guarantee_number_required
data.value: Enter the replacement guarantee number before applying this response.

data.name: operations.response_type_not_supported
data.value: This bank response type is not supported for operational application yet.

data.name: operations.actor_required
data.value: Select the acting operations reviewer first.

data.name: operations.actor_invalid
data.value: The selected operations actor is not valid for this queue.

data.name: OperationsLedgerPolicy_MatchedSuggestionApplied
data.value: System match suggestion was confirmed and applied

data.name: OperationsLedgerPolicy_ManualRequestSelectionApplied
data.value: Manual request selection was applied by operations

data.name: ApprovalDelegation_Summary
data.value: Temporarily delegate a workflow approval role to another employee during absence, while preserving an explicit on-behalf-of audit trail.

data.name: ApprovalDelegation_CreateSummary
data.value: Choose the absent role owner, the temporary delegate, the approval role, and the active period.

data.name: ApprovalDelegation_ListSummary
data.value: Review current, upcoming, expired, and revoked approval delegations in one place.

data.name: ApprovalDelegation_Empty
data.value: No approval delegations were recorded yet.

data.name: approvals.delegation_same_user_not_allowed
data.value: The delegator and delegate must be different users.

data.name: approvals.delegation_user_not_found
data.value: One of the selected users is missing or inactive.

data.name: approvals.delegation_role_not_found
data.value: The selected approval role was not found.

data.name: approvals.delegation_delegator_role_required
data.value: The delegator does not currently own the selected approval role.

data.name: approvals.delegation_invalid_period
data.value: Enter a valid delegation period where the end is later than the start.

data.name: approvals.delegation_overlap
data.value: This delegate already has another delegation for the same role during the selected period.

data.name: approvals.delegation_not_found
data.value: The selected approval delegation was not found.

data.name: approvals.delegation_already_revoked
data.value: This approval delegation was already revoked.

data.name: WorkspaceShell_CurrentUserScopeNotice
data.value: This workspace is locked to your signed-in user session.

data.name: WorkspaceShell_SelectUserFirst
data.value: Sign in first to enter this workspace.

data.name: WorkspaceShell_AccessDenied
data.value: Your signed-in user is not allowed to access that workspace.

data.name: WorkspaceShell_UserNotFound
data.value: That user is no longer available for sign-in.

data.name: WorkspaceShell_SignInRequired
data.value: Sign in to open that workspace.

data.name: WorkspaceShell_InvalidSignInUser
data.value: Select a valid user to sign in.

data.name: SignIn_Summary
data.value: Sign in with your assigned local credentials to lock the interface to your roles and permissions.

data.name: SignIn_NoUsersBody
data.value: No active users are available for sign-in.
